Comment on attachment 208487
enable concurrent installation

If adding concurrent is a fix because two concurrent versions of scapy currently CONFLICT, then this change is:

Approved by: portmgr (blanket: framework compliance (python))

If so, please set maintainer-approval to + and you may self-assign to commit without approval (contingent on QA passing of course)
